explanation: The property states that globally, if the entire self-test procedure passes successfully, then the oxygen sensor test must also pass successfully. This accurately captures the requirement that a successful self-test 'confirms' the oxygen sensor's calibration by ensuring its dedicated test passes as part of the overall procedure.

The property states that whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it must eventually lead to 'testOxygenSensorPass' becoming true. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure, when active, is designed to successfully confirm the oxygen sensor's calibration. No specific duration is mentioned, so the 'eventually' operator (F) is used without a time bound.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it is guaranteed that eventually the 'testOxygenSensorPass' will be true. This captures the intent that the self-test procedure, when active, will lead to the confirmation (i.e., success) of the oxygen sensor calibration.

The property states that whenever the system is in the 'SelfTestMode', it must be the case that the 'testOxygenSensorPass' condition is true. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure confirms the oxygen sensor is calibrated by ensuring that the oxygen sensor test passes while the self-test is active.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in 'SelfTestMode' (the self-test procedure is active), then eventually (F) the 'testOxygenSensorPass' will occur, meaning the oxygen sensor's calibration is confirmed. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure will lead to the confirmation of the oxygen sensor's calibration.

The property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode' (the self-test procedure is active), the 'testOxygenSensorPass' must also be true. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure confirms, or ensures the calibration of the oxygen sensor, as long as the procedure is running.

This LTL property states that globally, whenever the system is in 'SelfTestMode', it must eventually be the case that the 'testOxygenSensorPass' (i.e., the oxygen sensor is confirmed to be calibrated). This directly captures that the self-test procedure ensures the calibration of the oxygen sensor.

The property states that globally, if the system is in SelfTestMode (representing the 'self-test procedure'), then eventually the 'testOxygenSensorPass' must occur, indicating that the oxygen sensor is confirmed to be calibrated. This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure 'shall confirm' the calibration.

This property states that, globally, if the entire self-test procedure successfully completes (selfTestPass), it implies that the oxygen sensor test also passed successfully (testOxygenSensorPass). This captures the requirement that the self-test procedure, when successful, confirms the calibration of the oxygen sensor.

The property states that globally (G), if the system is in 'SelfTestMode' (bool_exp1), then it must be true that the oxygen sensor test passes (bool_exp3). This directly captures the requirement that the self-test procedure confirms the oxygen sensor is calibrated.
